<noinclude>
This is the '''Era''' template. It is used for historical era/period pages.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude><includeonly>
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right; margin-left:1em; width:300px;"
|+ style="font-size:1.1em; font-weight:bold;" | Historical Era
|-
! Era
| [[Era Name::{{{Era Name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
|-
! Period
| [[Start Year::{{{Start Year|}}}]]–[[End Year::{{{End Year|}}}]]
|}

{{{Era Description|}}}

== Properties Built During This Era ==
{{#ask:[[Category:Properties]][[Year Built::≥{{{Start Year|}}}]][[Year Built::≤{{{End Year|}}}]]
|?Current Address
|?Year Built
|?Architectural Style
|?Historic Status
|format=table
|sort=Year Built
|order=asc
|limit=200
}}

== Key People of This Era ==
{{#ask:[[Category:People]][[Census Years Present::~*{{{Start Year|}}}*]]
|?Occupation
|?Associated Properties
|format=table
|limit=50
}}

== Sources ==
''Add references for this historical period.''

[[Category:Eras]]
</includeonly>
